nodes.name: Turkey Meatballs & Pasta — Berry Boost Combo
nodes.description: name: Turkey Meatballs & Pasta — Berry Boost Combo | short_description: Turkey meatballs with whole-wheat pasta in marinara, topped with parmesan; Berry Boost indicates a berry-based fruit side for ad
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Turkey Meatballs & Pasta — Berry Boost Combo - name: Turkey Meatballs & Pasta — Berry Boost Combo | short_description: Turkey meatballs with whole-wheat pasta in marinara, topped with parmesan; Berry Boost indicates a berry-based fruit side for added antioxidants. | meal_suggestion: Serve with a side of mixed berries or a small berry compote to fit the Berry Boost concept; add steamed greens for extra fiber and micronutrients. | nutrition_note: Lean ground turkey provides high-quality protein; whole-wheat pasta adds fiber and complex carbs; marinara delivers tomatoes and flavor; parmesan contributes calcium. The Berry Boost name suggests pairing with a berry fruit side for extra antioxidants and vitamins.

nodes.name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Berry Boost Twist
nodes.description: name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Berry Boost Twist | short_description: Roasted chicken dinner with quinoa and vegetables (broccoli and carrots), adaptable with a berry-enhanced twist for extra antioxidan
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Roast Chicken Dinner — Berry Boost Twist - name: Roast Chicken Dinner — Berry Boost Twist | short_description: Roasted chicken dinner with quinoa and vegetables (broccoli and carrots), adaptable with a berry-enhanced twist for extra antioxidants. | meal_suggestion: Suggested portion: 4–6 oz cooked chicken thighs; 1/2–3/4 cup cooked quinoa; 1 cup broccoli; 1 cup carrots. Optional: include a side of berries or a berry glaze to fit the Berry Boost Twist. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich with chicken thighs and quinoa; fiber and vitamins from broccoli and carrots. Berry Boost Twist can be realized by adding fresh berries or a berry sauce on the side for extra antioxidants.

nodes.name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Garden Veg Style
nodes.description: name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Garden Veg Style | short_description: Sheet-pan pork dinner featuring pork tenderloin, potatoes, green beans, and olive oil. | meal_suggestion: Roast pork tenderloin with
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Garden Veg Style - name: Sheet-Pan Pork Dinner — Garden Veg Style | short_description: Sheet-pan pork dinner featuring pork tenderloin, potatoes, green beans, and olive oil. | meal_suggestion: Roast pork tenderloin with potatoes and green beans on a sheet pan, drizzled with olive oil and seasoned with garlic and herbs for a simple, nutritious dinner. | nutrition_note: Lean pork provides high-quality protein; potatoes supply complex carbs and potassium; green beans add fiber and micronutrients; olive oil contributes heart-healthy fats. For a balanced portion, aim for about 4–6 oz pork with 1–2 cups vegetables and a moderate potato serving per person.
